target.slice: SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag tab layout
target.writeBoundary: layout-only resource coordinate change; logic changes forbidden

userConfirmedIntent.summary: Align the Tag Param and Active Param edit control left edges with their header text left edges inside the SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag tabs.
includedBehavior: Move Tag Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Tag Param label left edge.
Move Active Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Active Param label left edge.
Apply the same layout adjustment to SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag dialogs.
excludedBehavior: No unrelated model or module changes.

allowedScope.expectedFlow: Resource-only coordinate adjustment for Tag Param and Active Param edit controls in two Laminator Tag dialogs.
includedBehavior: Move Tag Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Tag Param label left edge.
Move Active Param edit controls so their left edge matches the Active Param label left edge.
Apply the same layout adjustment to SMART-51 and SMART-52 Laminator Tag dialogs.

flows.reason: The user explicitly allowed only layout modification and forbade logic changes.
The request is visual alignment only.
No new controls or IDs are needed for a coordinate-only alignment fix.
Hardware validation is not required for a resource-only layout adjustment.

excludedBehavior: No unrelated model or module changes.
nonGoals: No logic, read/write, save/load, or hardware behavior change.

nodes.intentClaim: Tag Param and Active Param edit controls align their left edges to their matching header text in SMART-51/52 Laminator Tag tabs.
The Laminator Tag tab change is layout-only and must not modify C++ logic, resource IDs, device I/O, or save/load behavior.
A bounded resource-only Laminator Tag tab alignment fix remains active after build and user UI confirmation.

edgeIntents.claim: The active change is driven only by visual left-edge alignment of existing edit controls.
Future maintenance must keep this slice resource-layout-only unless the user explicitly opens logic or hardware scope.

remainingRisks: Version/release note update was not performed yet; decide during finalization if this layout change will be kept for release.
The build-generated .res artifact was restored so only the source resource file remains modified.
nextAllowedActions: Optionally update version/release notes before release.
Commit only after explicit user request.
